name: search_files
description: Search for files by name in Google Drive and get their view links

name.description: Search term to match against file names (partial match supported)

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: upload_file
description: Upload a file to Google Drive (optionally to a specific folder)

filename.description: The filename to use in Google Drive

folder_id.description: Optional Google Drive folder ID to upload to (use environment variable like PAYCHECK_FOLDER_ID if specified)

name: list_files
description: List files in Google Drive with optional filters

folder_id.description: Optional folder ID to list files from

page_size.description: Maximum number of files to return

name: get_file_metadata
description: Get metadata for a specific file in Google Drive

name: download_file
description: Download a file from Google Drive

file_id.description: The Google Drive file ID to download

name: delete_file
description: Delete a file from Google Drive

file_id.description: The Google Drive file ID to delete

name: create_folder
description: Create a new folder in Google Drive
